# VibeBasket
> The Ninite for Vibe Coding. Bundle trusted MCP servers, agent skills, and project rules into one shareable install command across 24 AI IDEs.

## Getting Started
- [Web Catalog](https://vibebasket.dev): Browse a live catalog that syncs tens of thousands of MCP servers, skills, and rules when fully refreshed. Build your basket and generate an install command.
- [Documentation](https://vibebasket.dev/docs): Full docs with Getting Started, CLI Reference, IDE Adapters, Block Delimiters, Security, and Self-Hosting guides.
- [Quick Install](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=cli): `npx vibebasket apply <bundle-url>` — one command to set up your entire AI dev stack.

## Architecture
- [Monorepo Structure](https://github.com/mhmtayberk/VibeBasket): pnpm workspace with 5 packages — apps/web (Next.js 16), apps/cli (Node.js), packages/core (shared DB + schema), packages/adapters (24 IDE adapters), packages/registry (catalog sync engine).
- [Database](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=security): SQLite via libSQL with Drizzle ORM. Tables include catalog_items, bundles, catalog_sync_runs, sessions, accounts, verification_tokens, saved_stacks, saved_stack_items, saved_stack_targets, backup_storage_config, and site_config. FTS5 full-text search index on catalog.
- [Adapter Pattern](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=adapters): BaseAdapter class with shared readConfig, applyMcps, writeConfig, diff methods. 16 adapters use BaseAdapter; 8 with custom logic (Hermes YAML, Codex TOML, RooCode/Void delimiters, Aider/GitHub Copilot no-MCP targets).
- [Block Delimiter Engine](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=delimiters): `# >>> VIBEBASKET START: id <<<` / `# >>> VIBEBASKET END: id <<<` markers for idempotent file merging. Supports shell comments (#), HTML comments (<!-- -->), and YAML comments (#).
- [Security Model](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=security): End-user runtime secrets stay local to the CLI flow. Admin backup credentials may be stored encrypted at rest. Rate limiting on 8 API endpoints. CSP, CSRF (SameSite cookies), security headers on all responses.

## API Reference
- [GET /api/catalog](https://vibebasket.dev/api/catalog?type=mcp&limit=24): Paginated catalog with type, trust, freshness, and sort filters. FTS5 full-text search via `?q=` param.
- [POST /api/bundle](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=cli): Create a bundle from selected catalog items and target IDEs. Returns a URL for CLI apply.
- [GET /api/bundle/:id](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=cli): Retrieve a bundle manifest for CLI consumption.
- [GET /api/health](https://vibebasket.dev/api/health): Health check endpoint with DB connectivity test. Used by Docker HEALTHCHECK.
- [GET /api/catalog/status](https://vibebasket.dev/api/catalog/status): Catalog freshness status, sync counts, and source errors.

## CLI Commands
- [apply](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=cli): `npx vibebasket apply <url>` — Install a bundle. Flags: `--force`, `--scope user|project`, `--dry-run`.
- [list](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=cli): Scan installed MCPs, skills, and rules across all detected IDEs.
- [search](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=cli): Search the remote catalog from terminal. Configure `VIBEBASKET_API_URL` for on-prem.
- [doctor](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=cli): Diagnostic check of all 24 supported IDEs — config paths, installed tools, adapter health.
- [rollback](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=cli): Restore from timestamped backup files created during apply.
- [init](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=cli): Scaffold a new VibeBasket project with example config and bundle.

## Self-Hosting
- [Deployment Guide](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=self-hosting): Docker Compose, manual Node.js install, and the in-repo Helm chart for Kubernetes (Recreate strategy, uid 1001, existingSecret). Env vars: NEXTAUTH_URL, AUTH_SECRET, OAuth providers, catalog refresh token, backup storage backends (S3, R2, Azure, GCS, Spaces, Local).
- [Configuration](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=self-hosting): 15+ environment variables for auth, storage, and operational settings. SQLite WAL mode with single-writer constraint noted. Helm chart supports existingSecret for credentials.

## Contributing
- [Source](https://github.com/mhmtayberk/VibeBasket): MIT licensed. TypeScript strict mode. pnpm >= 9, Node >= 20.
- [Test Suite](https://github.com/mhmtayberk/VibeBasket): Hundreds of unit/integration tests (Vitest), Playwright browser coverage, and property-based adapter checks via fast-check.
- [Adapter Contributions](https://vibebasket.dev/docs?tab=adapters): New IDE adapters extend BaseAdapter. Config path resolution, MCP apply, optional skills/rules support. 24 adapters currently supported.

## Optional
- [Changelog](https://github.com/mhmtayberk/VibeBasket/releases): Release notes and version history.
- [Open Source](https://github.com/mhmtayberk/VibeBasket): MIT License. Contributions welcome.
